description: Publishing a code example that no longer matches the current API, so readers copy a snippet that fails or misbehaves.
body: Failure mode: a doc example references an old signature, flag, or import that the code has since changed, but nothing executes the snippet so the rot goes unnoticed until a reader hits the error. Detection signals: the example fails when run; signatures in prose differ from source; no CI step exercises the snippet. Do not ship examples that nothing verifies. Safer fallback: extract examples into CI-run sources, fix them to match current code, and mark any genuinely non-runnable snippet as illustrative so readers do not expect it to work verbatim.
